artifacts.summary: Analyzed CanonicalMCS vs TimelineQuot domain gap. Found TimelineQuot elements contain MCS info via DenseTimelineElem. Recommended Option D: build FMCS over TimelineQuot directly using quotient representatives, then use Cantor isomorphism to Rat for AddCommGroup constraint. Estimated 3-4 hours implementation.

key_findings.domain_gap: CanonicalMCS (Preorder of all MCSs) vs TimelineQuot (Antisymmetrization of DenseTimelineElem, has DenselyOrdered)
key_findings.bridge_mechanism: TimelineQuot elements contain MCS via ofAntisymmetrization -> DenseTimelineElem.val.mcs
key_findings.addcommgroup_issue: TimelineQuot lacks AddCommGroup; use Cantor isomorphism to Rat
key_findings.recommended_approach: Option D - Build FMCS over TimelineQuot using representative MCSs
